english_name: The First Epistle of Paul the Apostle to Timothy

verses.latin_vulgate: Obsecro igitur primum omnium fieri obsecrationes, orationes, postulationes, gratiarum actiones, pro omnibus hominibus:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: παρακαλῶ οὖν πρῶτον πάντων ποιεῖσθαι δεήσεις προσευχάς ἐντεύξεις εὐχαριστίας ὑπὲρ πάντων ἀνθρώπων
verses.king_james: I exhort therefore, that, first of all, supplications, prayers, intercessions, *and* giving of thanks, be made for all men;

verses.latin_vulgate: pro regibus, et omnibus qui in sublimitate sunt, ut quietam et tranquillam vitam agamus in omni pietate, et castitate:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὑπὲρ βασιλέων καὶ πάντων τῶν ἐν ὑπεροχῇ ὄντων ἵνα ἤρεμον καὶ ἡσύχιον βίον διάγωμεν ἐν πάσῃ εὐσεβείᾳ καὶ σεμνότητι
verses.king_james: For kings, and *for* all that are in authority; that we may lead a quiet and peaceable life in all godliness and honesty.

verses.latin_vulgate: hoc enim bonum est, et acceptum coram Salvatore nostro Deo,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τοῦτο γὰρ καλὸν καὶ ἀπόδεκτον ἐνώπιον τοῦ σωτῆρος ἡμῶν θεοῦ
verses.king_james: For this *is* good and acceptable in the sight of God our Saviour;

verses.latin_vulgate: qui omnes homines vult salvos fieri, et ad agnitionem veritatis venire.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὃς πάντας ἀνθρώπους θέλει σωθῆναι καὶ εἰς ἐπίγνωσιν ἀληθείας ἐλθεῖν
verses.king_james: Who will have all men to be saved, and to come unto the knowledge of the truth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Unus enim Deus, unus et mediator Dei et hominum homo Christus Jesus:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: εἷς γὰρ θεός εἷς καὶ μεσίτης θεοῦ καὶ ἀνθρώπων ἄνθρωπος χριστὸς ἰησοῦς
verses.king_james: For *there is* one God, and one mediator between God and men, the man Christ Jesus;

verses.latin_vulgate: qui dedit redemptionem semetipsum pro omnibus, testimonium temporibus suis:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὁ δοὺς ἑαυτὸν ἀντίλυτρον ὑπὲρ πάντων τὸ μαρτύριον καιροῖς ἰδίοις
verses.king_james: Who gave himself a ransom for all, to be testified in due time.

verses.latin_vulgate: in quo positus sum ego prædicator, et Apostolus (veritatem dico, non mentior) doctor gentium in fide, et veritate.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: εἰς ὃ ἐτέθην ἐγὼ κῆρυξ καὶ ἀπόστολος ἀλήθειαν λέγω ἐν χριστῷ οὐ ψεύδομαι διδάσκαλος ἐθνῶν ἐν πίστει καὶ ἀληθείᾳ
verses.king_james: Whereunto I am ordained a preacher, and an apostle, (I speak the truth in Christ, *and* lie not;) a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and verity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Volo ergo viros orare in omni loco, levantes puras manus sine ira et disceptatione.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: βούλομαι οὖν προσεύχεσθαι τοὺς ἄνδρας ἐν παντὶ τόπῳ ἐπαίροντας ὁσίους χεῖρας χωρὶς ὀργῆς καὶ διαλογισμοῦ
verses.king_james: I will therefore that men pray every where, lifting up holy hands, without wrath and doubting.

verses.latin_vulgate: Similiter et mulieres in habitu ornato, cum verecundia et sobrietate ornantes se, et non in tortis crinibus, aut auro, aut margaritas, vel veste pretiosa:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὡσαύτως καὶ τὰς γυναῖκας ἐν καταστολῇ κοσμίῳ μετὰ αἰδοῦς καὶ σωφροσύνης κοσμεῖν ἑαυτάς μὴ ἐν πλέγμασιν ἢ χρυσῷ ἢ μαργαρίταις ἢ ἱματισμῷ πολυτελεῖ
verses.king_james: In like manner also, that women adorn themselves in modest apparel, with shamefacedness and sobriety; not with broided hair, or gold, or pearls, or costly array;

verses.latin_vulgate: sed quod decet mulieres, promittentes pietatem per opera bona.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀλλ᾽ ὃ πρέπει γυναιξὶν ἐπαγγελλομέναις θεοσέβειαν δι᾽ ἔργων ἀγαθῶν
verses.king_james: But (which becometh women professing godliness) with good works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mulier in silentio discat cum omni subjectione.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: γυνὴ ἐν ἡσυχίᾳ μανθανέτω ἐν πάσῃ ὑποταγῇ
verses.king_james: Let the woman learn in silence with all subjection.

verses.latin_vulgate: Docere autem mulierem non permitto, neque dominari in virum: sed esse in silentio.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: γυναικὶ δὲ διδάσκειν οὐκ ἐπιτρέπω οὐδὲ αὐθεντεῖν ἀνδρός ἀλλ᾽ εἶναι ἐν ἡσυχίᾳ
verses.king_james: But I suffer not a woman to teach, nor to usurp authority over the man, but to be in silence.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adam enim primus formatus est: deinde Heva:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀδὰμ γὰρ πρῶτος ἐπλάσθη εἶτα εὕα
verses.king_james: For Adam was first formed, then Eve.

verses.latin_vulgate: et Adam non est seductus: mulier autem seducta in prævaricatione fuit.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: καὶ ἀδὰμ οὐκ ἠπατήθη ἡ δὲ γυνὴ ἀπατηθεῖσα ἐν παραβάσει γέγονεν
verses.king_james: And Adam was not deceived, but the woman being deceived was in the transgression.

verses.latin_vulgate: Salvabitur autem per filiorum generationem, si permanserit in fide, et dilectione, et sanctificatione cum sobrietate.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: σωθήσεται δὲ διὰ τῆς τεκνογονίας ἐὰν μείνωσιν ἐν πίστει καὶ ἀγάπῃ καὶ ἁγιασμῷ μετὰ σωφροσύνης
verses.king_james: Notwithstanding she shall be saved in childbearing, if they continue in faith and charity and holiness with sobriety.
